records.question: Which publishers based in MA and USA have an employee with last name Thomas and middle initial H, and published titles priced at 7.0 released on 1991-10-05 with exactly 111.0 in year-to-date sales?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE publishers.state = 'MA' AND publishers.country = 'USA' AND employee.lname = 'Thomas' AND employee.minit = 'H' AND titles.price = 7.0 AND titles.pubdate = '1991-10-05 00:00:00.0' AND titles.ytd_sales = 111.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.pub_id
FROM publishers AS T1
INNER JOIN employee AS T2
  ON T1.pub_id = T2.pub_id
INNER JOIN titles AS T3
  ON T1.pub_id = T3.pub_id
WHERE
  T1.state = 'MA' AND T1.country = 'USA' AND T2.lname = 'Thomas' AND T2.minit = 'H' AND T3.price = 7.0 AND T3.pubdate = '1991-10-05' AND T3.ytd_sales = 111.0

records.question: Which publishers named Binnet & Hardley are located in Washington and have an employee named Peter H hired on or after 1992-05-17 with job level at most 75?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
WHERE employee.minit = 'H' AND employee.fname = 'Peter' AND publishers.pub_name = 'Binnet & Hardley' AND employee.hire_date >= '1992-05-17 00:00:00.0' AND employee.job_lvl <= 75 AND publishers.city = 'Washington'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.pub_id FROM publishers AS T1 INNER JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.pub_id = T2.pub_id WHERE T1.pub_name = 'Binnet & Hardley' AND T1.state = 'WA' AND T2.fname = 'Peter' AND T2.minit = 'H' AND T2.hire_date >= '1992-05-17' AND T2.job_lvl <= 75

records.question: Which publishers have employees with a job level exactly 175?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN jobs ON employee.job_id = jobs.job_id
WHERE employee.job_lvl = 175
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.pub_id FROM publishers AS T1 INNER JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.pub_id = T2.pub_id WHERE T2.job_lvl = 175

records.question: Which publishers have psychology titles with an advance of 4000.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE titles.type = 'psychology' AND titles.advance = 4000.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.pub_id FROM publishers AS T1 INNER JOIN titles AS T2 ON T1.pub_id = T2.pub_id WHERE T2.type = 'psychology' AND T2.advance = 4000.0

records.question: Which publishers are located in the state of CA?

records.pred_sql: SELECT pub_id FROM publishers WHERE state = 'CA'

records.question: What publishers in France named Lucerne Publishing have employees with the last name Jablonski, a middle initial J, hired on or after 1994-03-11, whose job level is exactly 75?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN jobs ON employee.job_id = jobs.job_id
WHERE employee.lname = 'Jablonski' AND publishers.pub_name = 'Lucerne Publishing' AND jobs.min_lvl = 75 AND publishers.country = 'France' AND employee.minit = 'J' AND employee.hire_date >= '1994-03-11 00:00:00.0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.pub_id FROM publishers AS T1 INNER JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.pub_id = T2.pub_id WHERE T1.country = 'France' AND T1.pub_name = 'Lucerne Publishing' AND T2.lname = 'Jablonski' AND T2.minit = 'J' AND T2.hire_date >= '1994-03-11' AND T2.job_lvl = 75

records.question: What publishers based in CA are named Algodata Infosystems and have titles with a 5000.0 advance, published on 1991-06-12, that sold at least 4095.0 units year-to-date?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems' AND titles.pubdate = '1991-06-12 00:00:00.0' AND titles.advance = 5000.0 AND publishers.state = 'CA' AND titles.ytd_sales >= 4095.0

records.question: Which publishers have the name exactly "Binnet & Hardley", are located exactly in the city "Washington", and also have related employee and pub_info records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN pub_info ON publishers.pub_id = pub_info.pub_id
WHERE publishers.pub_name = 'Binnet & Hardley' AND publishers.city = 'Washington'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.pub_id FROM publishers AS T1 INNER JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.pub_id = T2.pub_id INNER JOIN pub_info AS T3 ON T1.pub_id = T3.pub_id WHERE T1.pub_name = 'Binnet & Hardley' AND T1.city = 'Washington'

records.question: What publishers named Lucerne Publishing are located in Paris, France?

WHERE publishers.pub_name = 'Lucerne Publishing' AND publishers.country = 'France' AND publishers.city = 'Paris'
records.pred_sql: SELECT pub_id FROM publishers WHERE pub_name = 'Lucerne Publishing' AND city = 'Paris' AND country = 'France'

records.question: Which publishers have titles with an advance exactly 8000.0 and price exactly 20.0, published on or after 1994-06-12, with royalties at most 10.0 and year-to-date sales at least 4095?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN pub_info ON publishers.pub_id = pub_info.pub_id
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE titles.advance = 8000.0 AND titles.price = 20.0 AND titles.pubdate >= '1994-06-12 00:00:00.0' AND titles.royalty <= 10.0 AND titles.ytd_sales >= 4095.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.pub_id FROM publishers AS T1 INNER JOIN titles AS T2 ON T1.pub_id = T2.pub_id WHERE T2.advance = 8000.0 AND T2.price = 20.0 AND T2.pubdate >= '1994-06-12' AND T2.royalty <= 10.0 AND T2.ytd_sales >= 4095
